form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign fifth of 16 at this track October 22 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Surf End with 56kg at $22.85. On debut fourth of 9 at Palermo June 13 over 1200m, 9 len behind Dimes Y Diretes carrying 55kg at $13.60. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: First-starter by Annals Of Time out of Nabta. Watch for a market push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Annals Of Time out of Nabta. Watch for a market push.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last of 9 at this track on January 14 over 1200m, 28 len behind Packam carrying 56kg at $47.50. Went for a spell before returning 5th of 9 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 6 len behind Irremediablemente carrying 52kg at $73.30. Needs more time.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Second-up. First start ran last of 9 at this track on January 14 over 1200m, 28 len behind Packam carrying 56kg at $47.50. Went for a spell before returning 5th of 9 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 6 len behind Irremediablemente carrying 52kg at $73.30. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 8 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 9 len behind Magical Joy carrying 54kg at $10.70. The start before that 10th of 14 at this track on February 7 over 1200m, 10 len behind Cata with 54kg at $66.45. Expected to be doing her best work late.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 11th of 14 at Palermo on March 16 over 1200m, 18 len behind Miss Monique carrying 52kg at $49.30. Needs to do a lot more than she did on debut.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly who is first starter by Il Campione out of Ishi Ren. Expected to have plenty of admirers.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 5th of 11 at La Plata on January 29 over 1500m, 4 len behind Roula Rouva with 56kg at $9.75. Second-up 7th of 13 at La Plata on March 13 over 1500m, 11 len behind Jasmine with 56kg at $7.85. Solid top-three chance.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 33 day let-up. Last start 4th of 7 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 9 len behind Luna Gitana with 56kg at $2.45. The race before that came from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Hottest carrying 56kg at $6.85. Can make amends.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 5th of 7 at this track on February 1 over 1400m, 15 len behind Liturgia Latina carrying 56kg at $9.15. When resuming last campaign 8th of 12 at this track on April 25 over 1500m, 12 len behind Plaza Athenee carrying 55kg at $6.20. Expect a forward showing.
